name: coverage matrix: --flag-uncovered exits 1 listing sources from STANDARDS-URLS.yaml that have zero citing rules
command:
mkdir -p tree && printf "- id: orphan-source
  name: Orphan
  url: https://o.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard
  authority_tier: 1
  fragility_tier: low
  fragility_strategy: silent-replace
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
  identifier_pattern: x
  license_note: MIT
  origin: operator
  added_by: op
  added_at: 2026-05-04
" > sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree "$PWD/tree" --catalog "$PWD/sources.yaml" --flag-uncovered
